items.name: tool-discipline
items.description: How to use tools effectively. These rules adapt based on which tools are available — if a tool isn't loaded, its rules don't apply.
items.author: Curtis Mercier
items.breadcrumb: How to use tools effectively. These rules adapt based on which tools are available — if a tool isn't loaded, its rules don't apply.

items.name: workflow
items.description: A disciplined loop for shipping code safely: test → commit → push. Every step has a reason. Skipping one creates risk that compounds silently.
items.author: Curtis Mercier
items.breadcrumb: A disciplined loop for shipping code safely: test → commit → push. Every step has a reason. Skipping one creates risk that compounds silently.
